comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text:
🌍 What fascinated you most about the Faroe Islands?
Give this documentary a rating from 0–10 and share your thoughts below!
📍 Where are you watching from? Let us know your country or city in the comments.
❤ If you enjoy exploring hidden places and remarkable cultures, don't forget to subscribe and share this journey with fellow travelers.
Every comment, like, and subscription helps us continue creating more immersive travel documentaries and bringing hidden corners of the world to your screen.

comments.author: @rayonaakramova9390
comments.text: Very beautiful Island, I would like to visit and try their traditions! Adorable 😍❤️

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thank you so much! ❤ So glad you liked it. Please stay tuned and keep supporting the channel for more adventures! ✨🙏

comments.author: @tzalwelgaanzeker
comments.text: Get rid of all the AI and I would subscribe but this is just overload :(

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text:
@tzalwelgaanzeker I am genuinely grateful for such thoughtful and incredibly detailed feedback! 🙏 It is rare to receive a comment that hits the mark so perfectly. I hear you loud and clear: authenticity is the soul of a documentary, and I truly value your perspective on where the balance was lost.

I want to clarify that while I use AI as a support tool to help with the workload, I never want to be dependent on it. Every scenic are real and I put a lot of effort into building knowledge-rich script.

Your points about the voiceover intonation and speed are also very helpful. I am definitely going to explore different voices to find a more natural fit and will be much more selective with the imagery, including the thumbnails, to ensure the 'human' side of the journey shines through. 🎞

Thank you so much for subscribing despite the flaws. It’s viewers like you who motivate me to grow. I look forward to bringing you better, more authentic adventures in the next videos! ❤✨🚀

replies.author: @tzalwelgaanzeker
replies.text:
@EpicEarthYTB The picture on the video is just so much AI. It is unnecessary because you already have so much amazing footage from the islands. Adding generated salmon sellers and making it seem almost like a medieval market is overload in my eyes. The voice as you mentioned just doesnt feel right for this video. It's not the script, just the intonation and speed of speaking that turns me off.

I loved the editing of all the scenic shots and it was definitely an interesting topic that not many videos have been made about yet.

It's just my opinion of course, but making some changes to the AI usage would greatly improve the quality feeling. I know it is almost becoming for youtube videos to play with the algorithm but for documentary style videos, it is not a plus. Documentary style should communicate authenticity and AI usage makes it all feel less authentic.

Subscribed in any case, will watch new videos that come out :) good luck with the channel!

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: I really value your honesty! I'm still trying to find the right balance, so could you tell me what specifically felt like 'overload' to you? Was it the AI voice, the music, or something else? I want to make sure the human effort I put into the filming stays the main focus. Thanks for helping me improve! 🙏✨
